sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31835" key="e)kdeipne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδειπνέω</orth>, <sense id="n31835.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">finish a meal,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
